title: SaaS-Landing-page
description: A high-performance SaaS landing page built with React and Tailwind v4, featuring fluid Framer Motion animations and a sleek dark-mode aesthetic.

title: SkyCast - Weather Dashboard
description: SkyCast is a high-performance weather application built with React.js and Tailwind CSS v4. It features a dynamic UI that adapts its aesthetic based on real-time weather conditions.

title: ultra-modern Kanban Board
description: A sleek, ultra-modern Kanban Board built with React, Vite, Tailwind CSS v4, and Framer Motion. Features advanced state management, smooth drag-and-drop interactions, dynamic priority filtering, and instant keyboard shortcuts for seamless workflow optimization.

title: modern e-commerce landing page
description: Shoppystore is a modern e-commerce landing page designed to showcase locally sourced, premium goods.
